title: The striker quietly making a big noise at Arsenal
summary: Arsenal striker Stina Blackstenius plays a crucial but underrated role as the team faces Lyon in the Champions League semi-final second leg. Her contributions underscore the importance of squad depth in European competition.
content: As Arsenal travel to Lyon in the Champions League semi-final second leg, BBC Sport assesses the importance of unsung striker Stina Blackstenius.

title: 'Shy' Anderson on England nerves and becoming a leader
summary: Nottingham Forest midfielder Elliot Anderson has overcome his shy nature to emerge as a team leader. He discusses his personal growth and evolution as a crucial player for the club.
content: Nottingham Forest midfielder Elliot Anderson tells Kelly Somers about coming out of his shell to become a leader.

title: Tuchel helped me understand new role - Anderson
summary: Nottingham Forest midfielder Elliot Anderson credits Thomas Tuchel for helping him master his new deeper midfield role. The development represents a key milestone in his career progression.
content: Nottingham Forest midfielder Elliot Anderson praises Thomas Tuchel for helping him develop in a deeper midfield role.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United eye West Ham lef...

title: Weekend predictions: Can Man United beat Liverpool...
summary: Manchester United seeks Champions League qualification while Ipswich Town pursues Premier League promotion in crucial weekend matches. Experts weigh the likelihood of both teams achieving their ambitious objectives.

title: Darke: Expect more twists in Premier League title ...
summary: Despite Manchester City's stronger recent form, Arsenal remain genuine title contenders in the Premier League race. The competition continues to show unexpected twists as the season develops.
content: Pep Guardiola and Man City are in better form, but Arsenal aren't out of the title race yet.

title: USMNT's Busio helps Venezia return to Serie A
summary: USMNT player Busio helped Venezia secure promotion back to Serie A with a 2-2 draw that clinched their top-tier return. The achievement comes with one match remaining in their promotion campaign.
content: Venezia will be back in Italy's Serie A next season, after a 2-2 draw at Spezia on Friday secured promotion back to the top tier with a game to spare.

zh.title: 美国队球员布西奥助威尼斯重返意甲

title: Sources: Utd explore coach options, Carrick in lea...
summary: Manchester United is exploring multiple coaching candidates for permanent manager despite Michael Carrick leading the race as caretaker. The club is ensuring thorough evaluation of all available options.
content: Manchester United are determined to explore all of their options before appointing their next permanent head coach despite caretaker boss Michael Carrick leading the race to get the job full-time, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：曼联研究主教练候选，卡里克暂时领先

title: Arteta: Bayern, PSG in 'different worlds' to Arsen...
summary: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta contends his team competes in a different domestic landscape than continental powerhouses Bayern Munich and PSG. His comments reflect the different challenges facing English versus European elite clubs.
content: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta said his side were teams competing in "different worlds" domestically to Bayern Munich and Paris Saint-Germain.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔：拜仁、巴黎圣日耳曼处于与阿森纳"不同的世界"

title: $4K World Cup tickets for USMNT still available
summary: With the World Cup beginning June 11, tickets for most group stage matches remain available for general purchase with over a month until kickoff. The availability suggests continued strong fan interest in attending matches.
content: Tickets for most of the FIFA World Cup group games remain on general sale with just over a month to go until the tournament kicks off on June 11.

zh.title: 美国队世界杯4000美元门票仍可购买
zh.summary: 随着世界杯将于6月11日开始，大多数小组赛阶段的门票仍可供大众购买，距离开赛还有一个多月。门票的可用性表明球迷对观看比赛的兴趣依然强烈。

title: Liverpool's Salah: 'Time to go' after tough season...
summary: Departing Liverpool winger Mohamed Salah says he is at peace with his decision to leave at season's end after a difficult campaign. He emphasized his desire to depart on his own terms.
content: Departing Liverpool winger Mohamed Salah insists he is at peace with his decision to leave at the end of the season and go out on his own terms.

zh.title: 利物浦球星萨拉赫：在艰难赛季后"是时候离开了"
zh.summary: 即将离开利物浦的边锋穆罕默德·萨拉赫表示，在经历了困难的赛季后，他对赛季末离队的决定感到心满意足。他强调了自己想要按自己的意愿离开的愿望。

title: Leeds savor 'unbelievable feeling' as safety nears...
summary: Dominic Calvert-Lewin celebrated Leeds United's 3-1 victory over Burnley as the club moved closer to confirming their Premier League status. The win represents a significant step in the team's bid to remain in the top flight.
content: Dominic Calvert-Lewin savored the "unbelievable feeling" as he helped Leeds United take a massive step towards confirming their Premier League status with a 3-1 victory over Burnley on Friday.

zh.title: 利兹队庆祝"难以置信的感受"，保级在即

title: USL, players in tentative agreement on new CBA
summary: The United Soccer League and its players union have reached a tentative agreement on a new collective bargaining agreement for USL-Championship players. The deal addresses compensation and working conditions for league players.
content: The United Soccer League and the USL Players Association have reached a tentative agreement on a new Collective Bargaining Agreement (CBA) for players in the USL-Championship.

zh.title: USL与球员就新CBA达成初步协议
zh.summary: 美国职业足球联赛与球员工会就美国职业足球联赛冠军杯球员的新集体谈判协议达成初步协议。该协议涉及联赛球员的薪酬和工作条件。

title: Iran officials to meet with FIFA over WCup plans
summary: Iranian soccer officials will meet with FIFA in Zurich to discuss plans for their World Cup matches in the United States in June. The meetings mark final preparations for the international tournament.
content: Iranian soccer officials are set to meet soon with FIFA in Zurich about their World Cup games in the United States in June.

zh.title: 伊朗官员将与国际足联就世界杯计划进行会谈
zh.summary: 伊朗足球官员将在苏黎世与国际足联召开会议，讨论6月在美国进行的世界杯比赛计划。这些会议标志着这项国际赛事的最终筹备。
